faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Montclair, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Montclair range from $350 to $550 depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees, and can typically service your Montclair home or business within 24-48 hours.

faqs.question: Why do I have so many crickets in my Montclair home?
faqs.answer: Montclair's lush landscapes, mature trees, and proximity to wooded areas create perfect cricket habitats. Crickets are attracted to moisture, warmth, and light, often entering homes through cracks in foundations, gaps around windows, or basement entry points common in older Montclair properties. Our team identifies and seals these entry points while eliminating existing populations.

faqs.question: Are cricket control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We can also offer completely organic options for sensitive households. Our technicians will provide specific instructions for any precautions needed during and after treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in Montclair?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Montclair homes are significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of initial treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within 1-2 weeks. We offer follow-up visits to ensure the problem is fully resolved and provide preventative measures to keep crickets from returning to your property.
